name: rldyour-explore
description: Исследование docs, upstream и web evidence. EN: Technical and web research skills.

interface.longDescription: Исследовательские workflows Codex для official docs, upstream, web evidence и решений. EN: This plugin adds automatic research routing for Codex. Its skills should be selected automatically when the owner asks to research, investigate, study the internet, look up current information, verify a fact with sources, inspect documentation, find best practices, compare options, or close unknowns before implementation. tech-research is used before complex technical implementation: it closes feature scope through Context7 for official documentation, DeepWiki for open-source repository architecture, and Grep by Vercel for real GitHub usage patterns. web-research is used for broader internet research: it first defines questions and constraints, then finds authoritative sources, reads them, and synthesizes conclusions with links. The plugin does not store secrets and does not configure MCP transports directly; it depends on MCP servers provided by rldyour-mcps. User-facing answers remain Russian unless the owner asks otherwise, while repository documentation is written in English.
defaultPrompt: Используй $tech-research: official docs и patterns. EN: technical research.
Используй $web-research: интернет-источники и ссылки. EN: web research.
Используй $tech-research: закрой unknowns перед кодом. EN: research before coding.
